headline: Stocks Mixed Awaiting Fresh Iran News
summary: The S&P 500 Index ($SPX ) (SPY ) today is down -0.07%, the Dow Jones Industrial Average ($DOWI ) (DIA ) is up +0.54%, and the Nasdaq 100 Index ($IUXX ) (QQQ ) is down -0.44%. June E-mini S&P futures (ESM26 ) are down -0.07%, and June E-mini Nasdaq futures...

headline: Mizuho Maintains Underperform on APA, Raises Price Target to $36
summary: Mizuho  analyst William Janela   maintains APA (NASDAQ:APA) with a Underperform and raises the price target from $32 to $36.
